Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4900 "WORLDCHAMPIONSHIPSOCCER-0900-4900" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "World Championship Soccer (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0900 to initialise colour RAM and display the loading screen. It then waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
